item.title: Windows Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Windows Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverydata
item.itunes:summary:
Windows Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Windows Data Recovery software provides facility to retrieve your accidently deleted folders from different types of mass storage device within short duration of time. Flash drive data restoration program is able to revive your erased memorable birthday photos and missing favorite video songs collection using advanced disk scanning mechanism. Speedy and mighty recovery software is available on www.prodatadoctor.net and can be easily downloaded in few steps which helps user to retrieve your valuable official documents that are lost by virus/warm attack from your storage media device. File recovery program is designed with innovative technology which helps user to retrieve your text documents folders from your flash drives within few easy mouse clicks. File restoration application does not require any external device for recovery of logically corrupted image folders from different type of storage media such as hard disk and pen drives. Windows Data Recovery software supports all major brands of USB drives as SanDisk, Transcend, Kingston, Sony, Nikon and Canon to revive your family friends pictures that are damaged by improper usage of removable media. Professional file restoration application provides a facility to revive your accidently lost school friends group photos that are lost by human error from your removable media device. Recovery tools for windows supports all major brands of removable media drives as Hitachi, Toshiba and Samsung to retrieve your valuable business information file very quickly.Features:* Data retrieval program is used to retrieve your lost business data folder from your different type of mass storage devices.* Windows Data restoration software uses advanced disk scanning mechanism for retrieving your deleted pictures file.* Disk scanning features of retrieving application is capable for restoration of logically formatted ms office doc folders very easily.

[read more]

Windows Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Windows Data Recovery software provides facility to retrieve your accidently deleted folders from different types of mass storage device within short duration of time. Flash drive data restoration program is able to revive your erased memorable birthday photos and missing favorite video songs collection using advanced disk scanning mechanism. [read more]
item.content:encoded:
Windows Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Windows Data Recovery software provides facility to retrieve your accidently deleted folders from different types of mass storage device within short duration of time. Flash drive data restoration program is able to revive your erased memorable birthday photos and missing favorite video songs collection using advanced disk scanning mechanism. Speedy and mighty recovery software is available on www.prodatadoctor.net and can be easily downloaded in few steps which helps user to retrieve your valuable official documents that are lost by virus/warm attack from your storage media device. File recovery program is designed with innovative technology which helps user to retrieve your text documents folders from your flash drives within few easy mouse clicks. File restoration application does not require any external device for recovery of logically corrupted image folders from different type of storage media such as hard disk and pen drives. Windows Data Recovery software supports all major brands of USB drives as SanDisk, Transcend, Kingston, Sony, Nikon and Canon to revive your family friends pictures that are damaged by improper usage of removable media. Professional file restoration application provides a facility to revive your accidently lost school friends group photos that are lost by human error from your removable media device. Recovery tools for windows supports all major brands of removable media drives as Hitachi, Toshiba and Samsung to retrieve your valuable business information file very quickly.Features:* Data retrieval program is used to retrieve your lost business data folder from your different type of mass storage devices.* Windows Data restoration software uses advanced disk scanning mechanism for retrieving your deleted pictures file.* Disk scanning features of retrieving application is capable for restoration of logically formatted ms office doc folders very easily.

[read more]

item.title: Turntable Digital Clock [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Turntable Digital Clock [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: gui-os
item.itunes:summary:
Turntable Digital Clock
(Utilities)
For android only...
You can set digital clock as your turntable watch to check the present time as you lay in your bed at night.
For that purpose you need to install the following apps from playstore
Wow clock minimal flip
Custom screen rotation
Proximity sensor screen
App off timer

Custom screen rotation can be used to put wow clock as landscape (horizontal screen view)
Proximity sensor screen to put screen on functionality without pressing any button - only put your hand closed on camera.
App off timer to disable after period time the proximity sensor screen - otherwise it will be unpleasure after you go out of your home...
[read more]
item.description:
Turntable Digital Clock
(Utilities)
For android only...
You can set digital clock as your turntable watch to check the present time as you lay in your bed at night.
For that purpose you need to install the following apps from playstore
Wow clock minimal flip
Custom screen rotation
Proximity sensor screen
App off timer

Custom screen rotation can be used to put wow clock as landscape (horizontal screen view)
Proximity sensor screen to put screen on functionality without pressing any button - only put your hand closed on camera.
App off timer to disable after period time the proximity sensor screen - otherwise it will be unpleasure after you go out of your home...
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Turntable Digital Clock
(Utilities)
For android only...
You can set digital clock as your turntable watch to check the present time as you lay in your bed at night.
For that purpose you need to install the following apps from playstore
Wow clock minimal flip
Custom screen rotation
Proximity sensor screen
App off timer

Custom screen rotation can be used to put wow clock as landscape (horizontal screen view)
Proximity sensor screen to put screen on functionality without pressing any button - only put your hand closed on camera.
App off timer to disable after period time the proximity sensor screen - otherwise it will be unpleasure after you go out of your home...
[read more]

item.title: Bulk SMS Gateway [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Bulk SMS Gateway [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverydata
item.itunes:summary:
Bulk SMS Gateway
(Utilities)
Bulk SMS Gateway service can be easily downloaded from www.prodatadoctor.net that reduce your business product advertising cost and send urgent mobile alert to your company employee within a minute. Mass SMS sender utility is designed with innovative feature which provides a facility of mobile marketing, job event, price alert and interview calls on a low cost. Bulk SMS program provides a most convenient way to communicate with your business friend on time you are attending a conference meeting and helps user to increase brand values. Professional bulk SMS software does not require any external device to broadcast standard messages and helps user for mobile marketing. Mass messaging software helps user to inform product news and remind your business meeting or appointment. Bulk SMS Gateway application provides option to skip duplicate contact numbers entries and generate immediate response via messages very quickly. Download bulk messaging service which support all UNI code languages to create text format SMS and send to a group of people on same time within a short duration of time. Free messaging software is helpful for generating report of all sent SMS and saves in html or text file format for future reference. Group text messaging software supports all major brands of GSM cell phone to compose business product launching SMS and send on national and international network at any time. Bulk SMS sending application is designed with latest technology which provides a facility of global messaging and new product launching without any internet connection.Features:* Bulk SMS program application is used to broadcast text format message to a group of people on same time. * Advanced text message sending software does not require any external device for sending text SMS within a minute.* SMS sending program provides a facility to send job alerts, notifications and your business product advertisement and ad base promotion.

[read more]

Bulk SMS Gateway
(Utilities)
Bulk SMS Gateway service can be easily downloaded from www.prodatadoctor.net that reduce your business product advertising cost and send urgent mobile alert to your company employee within a minute. Mass SMS sender utility is designed with innovative feature which provides a facility of mobile marketing, job event, price alert and interview calls on a low cost. Bulk SMS program provides a most convenient way to communicate with your business friend on time you are attending a conference meeting and helps user to increase brand values. Professional bulk SMS software does not require any external device to broadcast standard messages and helps user for mobile marketing. Mass messaging software helps user to inform product news and remind your business meeting or appointment. Bulk SMS Gateway application provides option to skip duplicate contact numbers entries and generate immediate response via messages very quickly. Download bulk messaging service which support all UNI code languages to create text format SMS and send to a group of people on same time within a short duration of time. Free messaging software is helpful for generating report of all sent SMS and saves in html or text file format for future reference. [read more]
item.content:encoded:
Bulk SMS Gateway
(Utilities)
Bulk SMS Gateway service can be easily downloaded from www.prodatadoctor.net that reduce your business product advertising cost and send urgent mobile alert to your company employee within a minute. Mass SMS sender utility is designed with innovative feature which provides a facility of mobile marketing, job event, price alert and interview calls on a low cost. Bulk SMS program provides a most convenient way to communicate with your business friend on time you are attending a conference meeting and helps user to increase brand values. Professional bulk SMS software does not require any external device to broadcast standard messages and helps user for mobile marketing. Mass messaging software helps user to inform product news and remind your business meeting or appointment. Bulk SMS Gateway application provides option to skip duplicate contact numbers entries and generate immediate response via messages very quickly. Download bulk messaging service which support all UNI code languages to create text format SMS and send to a group of people on same time within a short duration of time. Free messaging software is helpful for generating report of all sent SMS and saves in html or text file format for future reference. Group text messaging software supports all major brands of GSM cell phone to compose business product launching SMS and send on national and international network at any time. Bulk SMS sending application is designed with latest technology which provides a facility of global messaging and new product launching without any internet connection.Features:* Bulk SMS program application is used to broadcast text format message to a group of people on same time. * Advanced text message sending software does not require any external device for sending text SMS within a minute.* SMS sending program provides a facility to send job alerts, notifications and your business product advertisement and ad base promotion.

[read more]

item.title: Filind Audio Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Filind Audio Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: ngupiware
item.itunes:summary:
Filind Audio Player
(Audioplayers)
Filind is a light free audio player application for Linux and Windows.
Shortcut :
1. Space = Play / Pause
2. Stop = end
3. Next = PageDown
4. Prev = PageUp
5. Volume Up = Shift + =
6. Volume Down = Shift + -
7. Mute = Delete

Just extract and play it
[read more]
item.description:
Filind Audio Player
(Audioplayers)
Filind is a light free audio player application for Linux and Windows.
Shortcut :
1. Space = Play / Pause
2. Stop = end
3. Next = PageDown
4. Prev = PageUp
5. Volume Up = Shift + =
6. Volume Down = Shift + -
7. Mute = Delete

Just extract and play it
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Filind Audio Player
(Audioplayers)
Filind is a light free audio player application for Linux and Windows.
Shortcut :
1. Space = Play / Pause
2. Stop = end
3. Next = PageDown
4. Prev = PageUp
5. Volume Up = Shift + =
6. Volume Down = Shift + -
7. Mute = Delete

Just extract and play it
[read more]

item.title: PixelProps Beta [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: PixelProps Beta [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: t3sl4
item.itunes:summary:
PixelProps Beta
(Utilities)
Welcome to the official PixelProps Pling page! This is where you can download the latest Pixel Beta props. These props are designed with a focus on functionality and compatibility.
One of the key features of our Pixel Beta props is their ability to pass Device Integrity checks within PlayIntegrity. This ensures that they integrate well with your device and applications.

As the sole developer behind PixelProps, I am committed to maintaining and updating the Pixel Beta props. Your feedback and experience are important to me, and they help in making PixelProps better.

Thank you for choosing PixelProps. Enjoy exploring our Pling page and feel free to reach out if you have any questions or feedback. I’m here to help!
[read more]
item.description:
PixelProps Beta
(Utilities)
Welcome to the official PixelProps Pling page! This is where you can download the latest Pixel Beta props. These props are designed with a focus on functionality and compatibility.
One of the key features of our Pixel Beta props is their ability to pass Device Integrity checks within PlayIntegrity. This ensures that they integrate well with your device and applications.

As the sole developer behind PixelProps, I am committed to maintaining and updating the Pixel Beta props. Your feedback and experience are important to me, and they help in making PixelProps better.

Thank you for choosing PixelProps. Enjoy exploring our Pling page and feel free to reach out if you have any questions or feedback. I’m here to help!
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
PixelProps Beta
(Utilities)
Welcome to the official PixelProps Pling page! This is where you can download the latest Pixel Beta props. These props are designed with a focus on functionality and compatibility.
One of the key features of our Pixel Beta props is their ability to pass Device Integrity checks within PlayIntegrity. This ensures that they integrate well with your device and applications.

As the sole developer behind PixelProps, I am committed to maintaining and updating the Pixel Beta props. Your feedback and experience are important to me, and they help in making PixelProps better.

Thank you for choosing PixelProps. Enjoy exploring our Pling page and feel free to reach out if you have any questions or feedback. I’m here to help!
[read more]

Aspect
(Graphic Apps)
Photo organization application with support for peer-to-peer based synchronization across devices.

item.content:encoded:
Aspect
(Graphic Apps)
Photo organization application with support for peer-to-peer based synchronization across devices.

[read more]

item.title: QmidiCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: QmidiCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
QmidiCtl
(Music Production)
QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]
item.description:
QmidiCtl
(Music Production)
QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
QmidiCtl
(Music Production)
QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]

item.title: QXGEdit [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: QXGEdit [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
QXGEdit
(Music Production)
QXGEdit is a Qt GUI for editing MIDI System Exclusive files for XG devices (eg. Yamaha DB50XG).

[read more]
item.description:
QXGEdit
(Music Production)
QXGEdit is a Qt GUI for editing MIDI System Exclusive files for XG devices (eg. Yamaha DB50XG).

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
QXGEdit
(Music Production)
QXGEdit is a Qt GUI for editing MIDI System Exclusive files for XG devices (eg. Yamaha DB50XG).

[read more]

item.title: Qsynth [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: Qsynth [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]
item.description:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]
